NEWS BJJ ARTICLES SHOP CONTACT CONTRIBUTE AN ARTICLE PRIVACY POLICY HomeArticlesBJJ News(WATCH) BJJ Instructor Demotes Student From Brown To Blue Belt (WATCH) BJJ Instructor Demotes Student From Brown To Blue Belt APR 10, 2026BJJEE1 AdminArticles, BJJ News A BJJ instructor has sparked widespread discussion after publicly demoting one of his students. Andre Seabra, who runs Instituto Fazendo a Diferença no Jiu-Jitsu, shared a video showing the moment he removed student Igor’s brown belt and replaced it with a blue belt in front of teammates. In the footage, Seabra explained the reasoning behind the decision: If there’s one thing that makes us very sad, it’s when a student disobeys their teacher, right? There’s a great principle, it’s biblical, which is to honor your father and mother. So we need to fulfill this principle. According to Seabra, the situation extended beyond the academy. He stated that Igor had disobeyed his mother and also failed to respond when the instructor tried to address the issue directly: With that, the mistake was serious. He’s leaving the brown belt and going back to blue. Seabra made it clear that the student would have an opportunity to earn his rank back: When you regain trust again, you’ll return to your rank. During the ceremony, Igor accepted responsibility for his actions: I’m sorry. I won’t do it again. In a follow-up post, Seabra elaborated on his philosophy: Yesterday once again, I had to make a decision and this time with my champion Xerife, after disobeying his mother and me as well, as a consequence I demoted him so that he would understand the gravity of the mistake, of course it will be for a brief time, but enough for him to understand. Teacher is synonymous with care, affection, commitment, empathy, kindness, guidance and transformation. Sloth Jiu-Jitsu: The Ultimate Guide for Calmly Beating Bigger, Younger Opponents 💥 What if slowing down was the fastest way to win? 💭 Tired of Getting Smashed by Younger, Stronger Grapplers? It’s not your age. It’s your strategy. If you’re a passionate grappler over 35 who’s sick of getting outpaced, outmuscled, or out-cardio’d by opponents half your age — this 120 page e-book was made for you. 🔓 Unlock the Power of Sloth Jiu-Jitsu: Build Sustainable Strength—Without Wrecking Your Joints, Energy, or Jiu-Jitsu Tired of waking up sore and burnt out after lifting? Sloth Strength is a proven blueprint for grapplers over 35 who want to get stronger—without the pain, burnout, or injuries. Developed from 25 years on the mats, this no-burnout approach is made specifically for BJJ athletes in their 30s, 40s, and beyond.
